title: aegilops cylindrica var. aristulata
intro: Aegilops cylindrica var. aristulata, also known as spike wheat or jointed goatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, due to its high content of fiber and other nutrients. Aegilops cylindrica var. aristulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
